nasb.text: Wondrously show Your lovingkindness, O Savior of those who take refuge at Your right hand From those who rise up against them.

esv.text: Wondrously show your steadfast love, O Savior of those who seek refuge from their adversaries at your right hand.

cnv.text: 求你把你的慈愛奇妙地彰顯， 用右手拯救那些投靠你的， 脫離那些起來攻擊他們的。

ccb.text: 求你彰显你奇妙的慈爱， 用右手拯救投靠你的人脱离仇敌。

csbs.text: 求你奇妙地显明你的慈爱； 拯救者啊，你用右手使投靠你的人脱离那起来的敌对者！
